title: Sword Art Online: Hollow Realization Deluxe Edition

notes:
Controller support just disappeared, now it won't detect DualShock4 whether SteamInput is enabled or not
There are some glitches in the main menu, but the game is actually playable with keyboard and mouse
title: Sword Art Online: Hollow Realization Deluxe Edition

notes: Worked pretty much perfectly out of the box. There was some stutter at the start, but it disappeared quite quickly. Framerate is slightly lower than on Windows, but still enough to maintain 60fps in most areas. DS4 controller also worked under Big Picture Mode.
title: Sword Art Online: Hollow Realization Deluxe Edition

notes: Worked pretty much perfectly out of the box. There was some stutter at the start, but it disappeared quite quickly.
